name: Omega Client
description: The last client you will ever need. Visual/QoL toggles for smooth PvP play: fullbright, combat-clarity block highlighting, FOV/zoom, toggle-sprint, an info HUD, and a WorldEdit-style schematic selection/ghost-preview tool. All settings, no automation or reveal-through-walls. Configurable in-game (default keybind: Right Shift) or from the Omega Client launcher.
